description: A pair of lightweight cummerbunds, which wrap around the stomach end of a plate carrier in order to keep the carrier firmly against the body.  This model features a sheer PALS grid, with large sections of the grid cut out in order to reduce weight, without having any negative effect on the MOLLE mounting capability.  Without a pair of cummerbunds, wearing any plate carrier will be uncomfortable.  Attach these to reduce baseline plate carrier encumbrance.

name.str_pl: pairs of Perroz Designs laser-cut MOLLE cummerbunds

description: A pair of sturdy, full-size cummerbunds, which wrap around the stomach end of a plate carrier in order to keep the carrier firmly against the body.  This model features an external PALS grid for strapping pouches onto, and an inner grid for attaching side plate pouches.  Without a pair of cummerbunds, wearing any plate carrier will be uncomfortable.  Attach these to reduce baseline plate carrier encumbrance.

variants.description: A pair of sturdy, full-size cummerbunds with a PALS grid, using an uncommon Quick Release interface used in modern Army plate carriers.  You should attach these to a plate carrier in order to reduce its baseline encumbrance.  <variant:ocp/plural>
